chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْوُقُوفِ عَلَى الصَّفَا وَ الدُّعَاءِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 141 – The pausing upon Al Safa and the supplication

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/68)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/68)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) كَيْفَ يَقُولُ الرَّجُلُ عَلَى الصَّفَا وَ الْمَرْوَةِ قَالَ يَقُولُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَ لَهُ الْحَمْدُ يُحْيِي وَ يُمِيتُ وَ هُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْ‏ءٍ قَدِيرٌ ثَلَاثَ مَرَّاتٍ .
لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَ لَهُ الْحَمْدُ يُحْيِي وَ يُمِيتُ وَ هُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْ‏ءٍ قَدِيرٌ

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Husayn Bin Saeed, from Fazalat Bin Ayoubm from Zurara who said,
‘I asked Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup>, ‘How should the man be reciting upon Al-Safa and Al-Marwa?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘He should be saying,

‘There is no god except fo Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, Alone, there being no associates for Him<sup>azwj</sup>. For Him<sup>azwj</sup> is the Kingdom, and for Him<sup>azwj</sup> is the Praise. He<sup>azwj</sup> Revives and He<sup>azwj</sup> Causes to die, and He<sup>azwj</sup> is Able over every thing – three times’.
en.sarwar: 3. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from al-Husayn ibn Sa‘id from Fadalah ibn Ayyub from Zurarah who has said the following: “I asked abu Ja‘far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, ‘What should a man say on al-Safa’ and al-Marwah?’ He (the Imam) replied, ‘He should say, ‘No one except Allah who is One and has no partners, deserves worship. To Him belong the Kingdom and all praise. He gives life and causes death and He has power over all things’ - three times.’”
